name: cortex
description: Personal dashboard for auditing your days as a founder, student, and human.
author: Pablo

scripts.electron:dev: npm run electron:compile && concurrently "vite --host" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder
scripts.cortex:install: npm run electron:build && rm -rf /Applications/Cortex.app && cp -R release/mac-arm64/Cortex.app /Applications/Cortex.app && xattr -cr /Applications/Cortex.app && codesign --force --sign - /Applications/Cortex.app/Contents/Frameworks/Electron\ Framework.framework && codesign --force --sign - /Applications/Cortex.app/Contents/Frameworks/Cortex\ Helper.app && codesign --force --sign - '/Applications/Cortex.app/Contents/Frameworks/Cortex Helper (GPU).app' && codesign --force --sign - '/Applications/Cortex.app/Contents/Frameworks/Cortex Helper (Plugin).app' && codesign --force --sign - '/Applications/Cortex.app/Contents/Frameworks/Cortex Helper (Renderer).app' && codesign --force --sign - /Applications/Cortex.app && open /Applications/Cortex.app

extendInfo.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Cortex needs access to your calendars to show your schedule.
extendInfo.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Cortex needs access to your calendars to show your schedule.
